for r in range(35, 51):

# Check for white cross
print("\n=== White cross check ===")
for r in range(29, 40):
    line = ascii_grid[r][15:28]
    if 'W' in line or 'w' in line:
        print(f"Row {r}: {line}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
